categories.translation: Online translation for UI snippets (MyMemory API — content may leave your device)
categories.aiMatching: AI candidate ranking (profile and job fields sent to the matching service)

dialog.title: Privacy & data choices
dialog.intro: Applicant profiles you manage are saved in this browser (local storage). Optional features forward data to third-party services only if you explicitly enable them below.
dialog.necessaryNote: Always on: storing your data locally, language and formatting preferences, and core app flows that keep applicant data inside the browser.

page.title: Privacy & your data
page.legalNotice: This page explains how Recruita handles data in your browser. It supplements your organisation's policies and duties as data controller.
page.summaryBody: This app runs mostly in your browser. Without optional features, resumes and profiles stay on your device. Enabling translation, lookup, or AI matching sends only the respective fields to external APIs as described.
page.procLocalStorage: Local storage: applicant records, workspace snapshots, locale, and consent flags remain on device.
page.procTranslation: Optional translation (off by default): short UI snippets may use the public MyMemory translation endpoint.
page.procGeocode: Optional city lookup (off by default): what you type in the location field is sent to Open‑Meteo geocoding to suggest places.
page.procMatch: Optional AI ranking (off by default): role text and applicant fields contained in scoring API payload are transmitted to your configured matching backend.
page.procFonts: Icons/styles: Material Symbols may load from Google servers; Latin UI text fonts are bundled in the bundle (no CDN for Manrope body text).
page.rightsBody: Open consent anytime to revise optional processing, download a structured JSON snapshot of locally stored applicant data for portability, or erase everything in this browser (clears applicants, preferences and consent — the app reloads).
page.eraseHint: Erasing wipes this browser profile only — it cannot remove server‑side telemetry your hosting exposes.
page.eraseConfirm: Delete all locally saved applicant data for this installation? Preferences and consent will reset and the page will reload.

main.headline: Effortless global recruitment
main.overlaySubtitle: Use the power of AI to find the best match

match.intro: Find and rank the best fit for open roles.
match.privacyConsentHint: AI matching requires consent under Privacy · enable optional matching or revisit the consent banner.

errors.privacyAiDisabled: Remote AI matching is turned off for this browser under Privacy settings. Enable optional matching there to continue.

applicants.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this applicant? This action will permanently remove their profile and all associated data from the curation registry.

export.title: Export applicants
export.jsonStructureDescription: Machine-readable hierarchical data for deep integration
export.csvTableDescription: Optimized for third-party analytical tool ingestion
export.pdfReportDescription: Editorial layout for stakeholder review and presentations
export.excelWorkbookDescription: Formatted with native pivot table compatibility

newApplicant.title: New Applicant
newApplicant.name: Name
newApplicant.locationGeocodingHint: Suggestions are paused: optional location lookups are off in Privacy settings (you can enter the city freely).
